evidence.source_title: Prostate MRI and image Quality: It is time to take stock.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 36870241. 2023/04/01 00:00. We present our viewpoint as urologists on how image quality impacts the 
management of men diagnosed with PCa andattempt to identify the factors that 
impact mp-MRI image quality, consequences of poor image quality, and finally 
suggestions for improvements.
